Tests if `Number.prototype` is a prototype of `Object.prototype`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks if `Object.prototype` is in the prototype chain of `Number.prototype`. It uses the `assert` function to verify that `Object.prototype.isPrototypeOf(Number.prototype)` returns `true`. This confirms that `Number.prototype` inherits from `Object.prototype`, which is a fundamental aspect of JavaScript's prototype-based inheritance model. The code provides narrow functionality, serving as a basic test or validation of JavaScript's inheritance structure.
